query: WITH entities AS (SELECT sent_total, id FROM core_liquidations WHERE COALESCE(collateral_id = $1, $1 IS NULL) AND (COALESCE((sent_total, id) > ($4, $3), $3 IS NULL)) ORDER BY sent_total ASC, id ASC LIMIT $2) SELECT i.id AS "entity_id: Repo__Id", e.sequence, e.event, CASE WHEN $5 THEN e.context ELSE NULL::jsonb END as "context: es_entity::ContextData", e.recorded_at FROM entities i JOIN core_liquidation_events e ON i.id = e.id ORDER BY i.sent_total asc, i.id asc, i.id, e.sequence
